unattributedLegacyDisposition: Assigned to explicit legacy-unattributed sentinel batch; no ownership inferred
appliedMembershipRule: Legacy semantic review_status=applied backfilled as apply_disposition=already_applied
approvedUnappliedRule: Other active legacy proposals backfilled as apply_disposition=pending
rerunSafety: Unique(proposal_id,batch_key) plus ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
